---
pagetitle: "Thomas Moerman"
---

::: {.home-grid}

::: {.home-left}
![](profile.jpg){.profile-pic}

[Thomas Moerman]{.home-name}
[PhD Researcher in NLP and AI, Ghent University (LT3)]{.home-title}

I develop retrieval-augmented and synthetic-data methods for natural language processing (NLP) and artificial intelligence (AI), applied to a range of tasks such as machine translation, educational NLP, and fairness in language models.

::: {.home-links}
<a href="https://scholar.google.be/citations?user=_c_5EIoAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a>
<a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0001-6021-8031">ORCID</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomas-andreas-moerman/"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
<a href="https://github.com/TomMoeras"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a href="mailto:Thomas.Moerman@UGent.be"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a>
:::
:::

::: {.home-right}

## News

- [June 2026]{.item-date} Presented our [EAMT 2026 paper](publications/2026-eamt.qmd) on machine translation in the asylum context, shortlisted for a best-paper award.
- [May 2026]{.item-date} [ShAnEL-2](publications/2026-lrec-shanel.qmd), our multilingual short-answer grading dataset, was accepted at LREC 2026.
- [March 2026]{.item-date} Our [study on fuzzy retrieval for automated grading](publications/2026-clinj-grading.qmd) appeared in the Computational Linguistics in the Netherlands Journal.

## Recent updates

<!-- Replace PASTE_URN_1 / PASTE_URN_2 with real post IDs: open a public LinkedIn post, click the three-dots menu, choose "Embed this post", and copy the urn:li:share:... id from the iframe src. -->

::: {.linkedin-posts}
<iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:PASTE_URN_1" height="420" width="504" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen title="LinkedIn post"></iframe>
<iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:PASTE_URN_2" height="420" width="504" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen title="LinkedIn post"></iframe>
:::

[Follow on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomas-andreas-moerman/){.btn .btn-primary}

:::

:::
